message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person with brown hair wearing oversized gradient-tint sunglasses, a light gray zip-up hooded jacket, and a dark top with pink lace detail holds the camera at arm's length for an outdoor self-portrait at dusk. The background shows a grassy field, a paved surface, and illuminated streetlights beneath a pale evening sky, with a tree trunk visible along the right edge of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred self-portrait exhibiting amateur snapshot energy shows a person wearing oversized gradient-tint sunglasses, a light gray zip-up hooded jacket, and a dark top with pink lace detail, their features streaked and softened by camera movement during exposure. The casual, unplanned framing captures a grassy field, paved surface, and glowing streetlights at dusk, while a tree trunk sits at the right edge, creating a lo-fi, dynamically imperfect impression.
